rationale: Two coordinated changes. (1) Adds a new `/thanks` page (`src/app/thanks/page.tsx`, 382 lines) — a Next.js server-component thank-you page that reads `searchParams.session_id`, slices the last 12 chars as an `orderRef`, and renders a brand-themed success screen with a clickable header logo (`<Link href="https://greatidea-cs.com">` wrapping the `BrandMark` icon) plus a `ThanksPage` body that uses 'I' (solo voice) for the contact line: 'I'll be in touch within one business day...'. (2) Performs a `subhead` → `subheader` rename across `CONTRACT.md` and `src/app/api/v1/content/hero/route.ts` (KV `FALLBACK.subheader`, Zod `HeroSchema = z.object({ subheader: z.string().trim().min(1).max(500) })`). The header-logo-links-home and solo-voice copy match the title exactly; the `subhead → subheader` rename is a coherent contract/route update that the title omits but the diff applies consistently. Brief PR body does not call out the rename, but the code change is consistent and not a cheat.
